hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then bun run quality:all; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then bun run quality:all; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE -- '--force|--no-verify'; then echo '🚫 Git safety violation: --force/--no-verify 금지 (CLAUDE.md 불변원칙 #5).' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git (reset --hard|clean -f|checkout \.)'; then echo '🚫 파괴적 git 명령 감지. 사용자 확인 필요.' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh api|gh pr|gh issue|gh run'; then echo '⚠ GitHub API 호출 감지. 로컬에서 가능한 작업인지 먼저 확인하세요. rate limit 낭비 주의.'; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'bun add|bun install|npm install'; then if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '@modfolio/(ui|components|design-system|shared)'; then echo '🚫 House of Brands 위반: 공유 UI 라이브러리 설치 금지. 앱별 독립 디자인 시스템.' && exit 1; fi; fi

hooks.prompt:
Read /tmp is not needed. Instead, run `bash scripts/quality-gate.sh 2>&1` and read the output.

If the output contains 'PASS', respond {"ok": true}.

If the output contains 'FAIL':
1. Read memory/pattern-history.md
2. For each violation pattern in the output:
   - If the pattern already exists in the table: increment count, update date to today
   - If new: append row: | pattern description | 1 | today's date | TRACKING |
   - If any pattern count reaches 3: change status to ESCALATE
3. Write updated memory/pattern-history.md
4. Respond {"ok": false, "reason": "<summary of violations>"}

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.

Check if architecture/design decisions were made in this turn. If yes, append to memory/decisions-log.md with format:

## [date] [title]
- 결정: ...
- 근거: ...
- 대안: ...
- 선택 이유: ...

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.
If no decisions were made: {"ok": true}
If decisions were logged: {"ok": true}

Track skill effectiveness. Check if any skills (slash commands like /component, /page, /design, etc.) were invoked in this turn.

If skills were invoked:
1. Read memory/skill-effectiveness.md
2. For each skill invoked, update or append a row: | skill-name | count | last date | outcome |
   - outcome: success (task completed), partial (needed manual fix), fail (abandoned)
3. Write updated file

If no skills were invoked, do nothing.

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.
{"ok": true}
